F

FlagHandler - Interface in cli
Strategy interface for processing different types of command-line flags.
FlagListener - Interface in cli
Defines a contract for observing and reacting to flag discovery events during the parsing process.
flagMap - Variable in class cli.FlagRegistry
 
flagName - Variable in class cli.FlagRule
 
FlagRegistry - Class in cli
A central repository for all registered FlagRule definitions.
FlagRegistry() - Constructor for class cli.FlagRegistry
Initialises an empty registry.
FlagRule - Class in cli
A stateful POJO (Plain Old Java Object) designed to represent a specific command-line flag definition and its subsequent parsed state.
FlagRule(String, FlagType) - Constructor for class cli.FlagRule
Constructs a new flag rule based on POSIX or GNU conventions.
flagType - Variable in class cli.FlagRule
 
FlagType - Enum in cli
Defines the expected behaviour and syntactical requirements for flag arguments and value separators.
FlagType() - Constructor for enum cli.FlagType
 
flattenArguments() - Method in class cli.LexicalCommandProcessor
Flattens the command line arguments into a single string.
